 234: 
 235: ### outra forma de obter as flags
 236: # FIN = 0x01
 237: # SYN = 0x02
 238: # RST = 0x04
 239: # PSH = 0x08
 240: # ACK = 0x10
 241: # URG = 0x20
 242: # ECE = 0x40
 243: # CWR = 0x80
 244: # And test them like this:
 245: 
 246: # F = p['TCP'].flags    # this should give you an integer
 247: # if F & FIN:
 248: #     # FIN flag activated
 249: # if F & SYN:
 250: #     # SYN flag activated
 251: # # rest of the flags here
